facts.value: Sleek black hair, fine, worn in a controlled ponytail with a scrunchie as the one allowed accent
Standards officer on the chapter executive board; runs conduct hearings, judges which sisters meet the house's standard
Locked-threshold habit (governs her own door)
Citrus on top, green and cold underneath, nothing sweet — as perceived by Pace
glamorous, aspirational; favors places like the Greek-coded coffee shop Chi Latte on Draper
Not driven into catastrophe by an unseen wound, but walked into it by a wound whose channel she chose half-seeing

Uses warmth as an instrument applied to logistics — engineers conditions so a target removes themselves, while staying warm and inclusive (same architecture as the SATC extraction and the off-campus brunch venue)
Has a single room (own governed door), earned via her board seat
Maintains a composure that Vee reads as freedom, but which is actually armor preventing self-actualization
Cannot tell anyone about the wound because the only person she could tell is the person delivering the evidence (Vee)

value.claim: Pace is her usual type of man
value.correct_statement: On paper Pace is disqualified — short (under 6 ft), a 'weird loner,' not her usual frat jock

value.claim: Vee receives her Miranda warning / is treated as a true equal confidante
value.correct_statement: Vee never gets her Miranda warning — Miranda runs an interrogation on her while appearing a confidante
Brooke (chapter president) still outranks her — the one house fact her self-arrangement can't rearrange

facts.value: Junior
Now a person who needs — having felt alive, she needs to feel alive again; the need is the wound and cannot be unmade
Carries a 'wound' associated with deprivation; her involuntary 'Yes' was described as 'the wound's first ambulant motion' — the wound choosing what it had been deprived of.
Often pulled back and bound at the nape, dark and finished — it moves only at the very ends in the wind
dry, observational humor that punctures his (Pace's) intellectualism
Her hands are one of the body's channels for managing what the voice will not do
Vee — her deepest want since the pointing game
Miranda = worthy of admiration (weaponized) + Miranda rights; runs an interrogation all novel while appearing a confidante
Preemptive naming — naming things before anyone else can, controlling how everything lands; applies it to others, her own desire, her own experience
Her 'game' — the extraction/operation — is the thing she is built for
The wound that learned to walk; her entire year is the elaboration of a single bare 'Yes' spoken in a campus pointing-game before she understood why
engineers exclusion of inconvenient parties through venue/condition selection while keeping her hands clean and appearing generous/inclusive
Money real but social ease not fully inherited; always performing a belonging she doesn't quite own
Her dignity is the choosing; her bleakness is the cost; both are hers
First-generation wealthy; father made money on PPP loans during COVID
Permanently possesses the comparison between the smooth/unreal life and the real sensation she experienced during the year; the knowing of unreality is what makes her future unbearable
Hates Pace; the hate is the one thing he has not been allowed access to
Dancer's body — elegant legs that take up most of her frame, with a decade of dance training written into her musculature.
Lived inside smooth pleasantness without knowing it was unreal; had no comparison
Has been given access to her own interior by Pace and discovered it is not what she thought
Has long known the face is exquisite with 'no one inside it'; aware of her own emptiness for a while
Has had popularity and admirers, but never an experience of being a real friend who is relied upon
Almost never says something she hasn't already rehearsed; lack of ready material signals the plan has escaped her
Gives a full smile that arrives all at once, described as a 'beam' she turns on people; makes the recipient feel like the only thing in the frame
Begged at the bench — 'Please. Please, Pace. Please.' — the first and only verbal admission of need in her adult life
Dark green Mercedes convertible — the green so dark it reads as black until the sun moves on it
The work of the year is operationalizing the same need in channels that do not require the begging-voice
Believes themselves to be the lesser one
Organizes her week around the SATC lunches more than around Pace or the sorority; they are the most important real thing in her life
'Yes, with data' — an informed yes: she would advance again every time, paying the loss of Vee repeatedly, because the alternative is the 'nothing' the flat date confirmed
Used to playing second fiddle to men and being sexually traded, and finds it thrilling
Her interior had not previously generated aliveness on its own
Maintains an internal 'apparatus' of containment/composure that suppresses expressions of need.
Her armor (evaluation-of-men apparatus) is built against coercion and against being used; calibrated only against bad men, not against a good man
Wants what Vee has — aliveness, bravery, the experience of being a real friend to someone who treats her as substance rather than position
Cannot separate her sadism from her genuine love for Vee
Feels empty/hollow during conventionally appropriate intimacy; experiences sex as a performance she could do in her sleep, 'operating the equipment'
Her threat-assessment judgment was correct/right
One of two central practitioners of 'habituated refusal' (her refusal of need; Pace's refusal of need is in a different register)
Perpetual seeking — measuring each approximation against an apex she cannot reconstruct; this is her present state, not a future trajectory

Substantially wounded at the bench in a single sustained scene — fast-installed, not slow-accumulated. Vulnerability-leading-to-regret installed in one operation. Depth of appetite = depth of structural change. (v7)
Three distinct appetites that ignite on different schedules: (c) loose aliveness-need, (b) hunger for the operation/domination-sadism rush, (a) specific sexual hunger for Vee herself
More aroused by an exquisitely-timed conversational humiliation of Vee than by competent sex with a man, because the former touches what she wants and the latter does not
Thrilling and demeaning are the same wound for her — shame functions as gasoline
Structurally paralleled with Vee so that neither woman is the villain; both are casualties of the same event
lesbian
Orderly; everything earns its hanger; palette runs bone to camel to oatmeal with one disciplined oxblood at the end.
Startlingly blue eyes that are the first thing anyone notices about her; she has built her entire adult life around being looked at for them.
Since the begging at the bench, Randi needs in operational silence — the need persists but the begging-voice is forbidden
Lived twenty-one years (her adult life) with no channels of aliveness
Gets aliveness-by-operating, which she now needs; lacks aliveness-by-being-able-to-self-actualize-the-need
All six channels (planning/replaying operations, Vee's updates about Pace, jealousy, sex with Pace, controlling Vee, engaging in scenes with Vee) are sources of aliveness
Holds one of the rare structural positions in the novel where she has agency Pace cannot access
Cannot be loved well; could not hold Pace's reception of her at the bench; no other channel exists through which she could be received at that depth

The quality of her attention: she makes whoever she is focused on feel like the most interesting person in the room. The effect is immediate and addictive; those around her are aware they are in a 'beam' even as they surrender to it.
Feels nothing without both Pace and Vee; requires 'both flames burning her' to feel anything at all
Defined by not needing; her core organizing principle was undone when she was made into a person who needs
Randi is running an exchange/operation that Cassie is not a player in
Experiences Cassie as an obstacle/thing in the way of what she wants, easily disposed of
a 9-10, the sorority archetype, 'contained' where Vee is abundant
Mental life consumed by the Vee-channel across six concurrent channels of aliveness
Gravitates toward petite, narrow-framed, polished women who are socially composed and aesthetically correct — women who share her grammar of designer labels, controlled presentation, and propriety.
Lived twenty-one years with no channels of aliveness
Holds visible campus prominence: sits on the standards board, led a philanthropy event covered by the campus paper, and is recognized as a social apex figure whose approval confers belonging.
Structurally orphaned — cannot be articulated to any standard the world or she would accept; held in private; no protocol was violated to justify it
Hatred of Pace; described as the most cultivated thing in her by the close of the novel
Hate is the only warm thing in her chest, valued because it is 'something she made herself'

Women who are physically present without apology, warm and open rather than closed or performative, and capable of genuine unselfconscious expression — the opposite of Randi's own carefully managed presentation. Revealed during the pointing game when given freedom to choose.
Organized against producing hunger at all; has no equipment/hardware for being a hungering thing
Hate, envy, sadism, and genuine liking are not separate engines but four faces of one wound, refracted through whichever party she is near

A narrow closet worked to its limit with a disciplined, stable system maintained over at least two years. Palette runs bone to camel to oatmeal with one deliberate oxblood accent, reflecting a temperament of controlled order with a single permitted intensity.
Small overnight bag, leather, monogrammed in a sorority hand; expensive in the slightly aggressive way her things were expensive

Brooke holds greater institutional and social authority than Randi within the chapter hierarchy; Randi recognizes from her own inside board experience that Brooke commands more organizational power than she herself does.
A slight perpetual surprise
Files Cassie as the dull, un-charmable, removable roommate

Deepest architectural fact (v6). Apparatus organized for twenty-one years so she would never produce need requiring another person; wanting permitted, getting sufficient. The need-refusal is so thorough it has no operational channels: she cannot ask, cannot receive-as-needing, cannot move toward the need.
A cashmere blanket, brought after the second week of their relationship because she gets cold after sex even in his too-warm house
One of two confidantes competing for Vee's disclosures; the 'hunger-object' representing glamour/ascent that Vee reaches toward
Highly trained social mover; can engineer apparently accidental meetings with strangers using precision and invisibility, developed through years of dance training and sorority social formation.
A loose aliveness-need awakened by Pace; already running before Vee; pre-articulate recognition that something 'might feed it'
Cannot abandon the configuration because it is six concurrent channels of aliveness, not any single element
Organized against need; not a needing person by constitution
Originally a choice, sustained into structural-feeling practice, prepared by family formation, deployed at adult scale, compounded across years
Built on control; experiences being seen as a breach of her only defense
Citrus with something green and cold underneath, notably absent of sweetness — Pace's unsophisticated read of her gardenia perfume
Cannot have a real, unmanaged want without wrapping it in a socially survivable frame, and the frame hollows out the realness
Operates on the thing she wants; produces in Vee the responses Vee's body is constituted to produce; 'has her hand on the lever'
Hunger for the operation — the domination/sadism rush; both anticipatory (planning lights it) and experiential (running it intensifies it), with the doing the stronger igniter

Within the sorority, Randi publicly frames her relationship with Pace as him simply being hard to say no to — a self-deprecating, low-stakes explanation delivered with a laugh that positions the relationship as something that happened to her rather than something she actively chose.
spent twenty-one years perfecting the surface Pace saw past
Has an 'armor'/apparatus designed to identify and repel threats

Carries a private envy of Vee beneath her controlled, appetitive surface. Publicly ranks Vee below herself in every social context, but privately wants what Vee has access to. This contradiction is not fully consciously acknowledged by Randi herself — it operates as a subterranean drive beneath her performed superiority.
At ease with want; runs on need, which she cannot supply herself and cannot be seen having

Acknowledged by the group as the most conventionally attractive person in the social circle by a measurable margin; men's attention distributes toward Randi over others (including Vee) when both are present — a stable background dynamic in shared social settings.
Pure dismissal; Cassie barely registers; non-affect is deliberate
Dark hair worn pulled back and bound at the nape; clean jawline; small, high figure. Favors fine materials — silk camisoles, cashmere. Presents an immaculate, finished surface at all times.
Operates on the very capacity she cannot possess; 'has her hand on the lever of an apparatus she does not possess'
Experiences the lunches with Vee as simultaneously the best and worst hours of her week; would not trade them
Specific sexual hunger for Vee herself; slowest to ignite; stays braided inside (b) for most of the year, not separated as naked desire-for-this-woman
Need inverted — forcing Vee into the needer-position so Randi stays the un-needy operator; the form her wanting takes when she cannot hold what she wants / when received-from is foreclosed
Need exists in her but functions as obstacle rather than orientation; lacks channels to ask, receive, or admit an interior requiring filling

behavioral_states.trigger: Caught off-guard or concealing something
behavioral_states.response: Smile visibly 'arranges' itself — a fraction-of-a-second delay before composure is restored, betraying calculation beneath the surface
behavioral_states.observable: A barely perceptible lag in the smile's appearance, as if it is being deliberately constructed rather than spontaneously felt

behavioral_states.trigger: alone with Pace in private aftermath following sex
behavioral_states.response: allows her hair to come loose and unbound, abandoning the controlled styling she maintains in all public and semi-public contexts
behavioral_states.observable: unbound, loose hair visible only in private moments with Pace — a stable marker of her rare unguarded state

behavioral_states.trigger: Randi wants more of Pace's time or to extract concessions from him
behavioral_states.response: Uses sequenced flattery — complimenting Pace's stamina, desirability, and rarity incrementally — as an indirect path toward getting what she wants rather than asking directly
behavioral_states.observable: Randi layers praise about Pace's qualities in a deliberate sequence before making any request or move toward a concession

behavioral_states.trigger: Running conduct hearings / judging sisters against the house standard
behavioral_states.response: Conducts interrogation while appearing to be a confidante
behavioral_states.observable: Presides over conduct hearings, grades other women against her own standard

behavioral_states.trigger: Feels a genuine unmanaged want (e.g., Pace, Vee)
behavioral_states.response: Converts the genuine attraction into a curated, socially survivable anecdote/frame
behavioral_states.observable: Repackages attraction as a story ('the sex is insane, he's a genius, it's an experience'); proposes the threesome as a frame

behavioral_states.trigger: After sex, alone with Pace in private
behavioral_states.response: Randi lets her hair down — the only context in which she does so; all other contexts she keeps it bound or controlled
behavioral_states.observable: Hair loose and unbound; visible only to Pace, signaling a rare unguarded and vulnerable state unique to their intimacy

behavioral_states.trigger: Randi acts on attraction to a woman
behavioral_states.response: Randi frames her desire as something she is doing 'for Pace/him' rather than acknowledging it as her own genuine wanting, using the framing as protective cover to permit herself to act on the attraction
behavioral_states.observable: Randi verbally attributes her pursuit of a woman to Pace's benefit rather than her own desire, though Pace recognizes this framing as camouflage concealing authentic personal desire

behavioral_states.trigger: Experiencing strong emotion that would typically cause crying or visible distress
behavioral_states.response: Emotional containment activates automatically through long-conditioned habit; Randi does not experience it as active suppression but as an absence — no door to hold shut, just no door
behavioral_states.observable: No visible signs of crying or emotional distress even under significant emotional pressure; suppression is invisible because it no longer manifests as visible effort

behavioral_states.trigger: Randi wants more of Pace's time or compliance during negotiation
behavioral_states.response: Delivers layered flattery about Pace's stamina, desirability, and sexual generosity as stepping stones toward extracting what she wants; both parties are aware of the tactic yet it remains effective because the compliments are grounded in truth
behavioral_states.observable: Randi visibly compliments Pace in escalating, targeted ways before making a request; Pace responds positively despite recognizing the strategy

behavioral_states.trigger: Every time Randi enters Pace's house
behavioral_states.response: She locks the door behind her, first thing, before anything else
behavioral_states.observable: The door is visibly locked immediately upon her entry, before any other action is taken

behavioral_states.trigger: Encountering an object or signal whose cost or status cannot be placed in a familiar register
behavioral_states.response: Looks at it repeatedly and registers it visually but does not comment and fails to complete the inference that would explain it — like reading a price tag she cannot parse
behavioral_states.observable: Repeated visual attention directed at the object without verbal acknowledgment or explanatory conclusion

behavioral_states.trigger: Randi closes a door
behavioral_states.response: Closes it with a small unhurried click, deliberate and unhurried, like a woman who knows the room is hers
behavioral_states.observable: Small quiet click; no rushing or slamming; conveys ownership and composure

behavioral_states.trigger: When scrutiny or attention is directed at Randi's real feelings about Pace
behavioral_states.response: Deploys a self-deprecating, lightly humorous framing — casting Pace as 'hard to say no to' with a what-could-I-do laugh — to redirect social attention away from genuine emotion and present a socially legible, low-stakes affect as cover
behavioral_states.observable: Laughs off the subject with a self-deprecating quip; appears breezy and unbothered rather than emotionally invested

behavioral_states.trigger: When greeting or connecting with someone
behavioral_states.response: Reaches out to squeeze the person's forearm
behavioral_states.observable: Hand extends to grasp and squeeze the forearm of the other person

behavioral_states.trigger: Randi decides to approach or intercept a target person
behavioral_states.response: She adjusts her trajectory and timing with calibrated precision so that the resulting contact appears to be a chance meeting rather than a deliberate approach, keeping her intention invisible
behavioral_states.observable: Contact looks like a spontaneous coincidence; no visible sign of planning or deliberate convergence on her part

behavioral_states.trigger: Pace activates a craving for aliveness in both Randi and Vee
behavioral_states.response: Randi cannot tolerate the exposure and hunger that aliveness brings and so seeks it vicariously through Vee, while Vee accepts the exposure because she has been hungry all her life; this structural mirror means neither is purely villainous — both are driven by the same need, only their capacity to bear it differs
behavioral_states.observable: Randi pursues closeness with Vee rather than simply opposing her; Vee endures vulnerability that Randi retreats from

behavioral_states.trigger: Randi evaluates or encounters other women socially or aesthetically
behavioral_states.response: She favors women who match her social grammar (correct labels, maintained physique, polished presentation) but rejects direct mirrors of herself and women whose warmth or ease is performed for an audience; she is specifically drawn to women who are genuinely warm and open without self-consciousness
behavioral_states.observable: Randi gravitates toward or shows approval of naturally warm, unaffected women while visibly losing interest in or subtly distancing from women who seem to be performing ease or who too closely mirror her own polished presentation

behavioral_states.trigger: When Randi is caught off guard or lying
behavioral_states.response: She pauses for a fraction of a second before responding
behavioral_states.observable: A brief, fraction-of-a-second hesitation or pause that serves as a physical tell

behavioral_states.trigger: Randi is genuinely concentrating or aroused, as distinct from her performed state
behavioral_states.response: Her blue eyes visibly darken
behavioral_states.observable: Visible darkening of Randi's blue eyes, distinguishable from her performed expressions

behavioral_states.trigger: Randi is concentrating on something
behavioral_states.response: Her resting expression of slight surprise sharpens into a questioning look, with specific attentiveness
behavioral_states.observable: Slight surprise of resting expression sharpens into a question; heightened attentiveness visible on face

behavioral_states.trigger: Randi encounters social or physical environments with rules, restrictions, or gatekeeping (restaurants, fire lanes, expensive spaces, wait lists)
behavioral_states.response: She moves through them as if the rules were designed for other people — parking in fire lanes, skipping waits, and occupying expensive spaces with the ease of someone who has never had to negotiate access
behavioral_states.observable: Parks in fire lanes, bypasses queues, occupies high-status spaces without visible hesitation or negotiation

behavioral_states.trigger: Randi experiences emotional need or vulnerability
behavioral_states.response: She never names the need aloud; naming it would constitute the very exposure she has structured her entire existence to prevent
behavioral_states.observable: Absence of direct statement — need is visible only in behavior, deflection, or what she avoids saying; the word or concept is conspicuously never spoken by her

behavioral_states.trigger: Any food choice or eating situation arises
behavioral_states.response: Randi applies an internalized system of permitted and forbidden foods, rigidly policing her own intake according to rules first imposed by her mother at age fourteen and later reinforced by her sorority at age eighteen
behavioral_states.observable: Randi visibly scrutinizes or avoids certain foods, making calculated decisions about what she will and will not eat in any given situation

behavioral_states.trigger: Randi closes a door upon entering a room
behavioral_states.response: Closes the door with a small, unhurried click — deliberate and unhurried, conveying ownership and belonging, as though the room has always been hers
behavioral_states.observable: A soft, deliberate click of the door latch rather than a quiet or forceful close

behavioral_states.trigger: Being seen / having her interior breached by another (Pace)
behavioral_states.response: Feels exposed; exposure curdles into resentment rather than gratitude
behavioral_states.observable: Resentment directed at Pace despite (or because of) his perceptiveness

behavioral_states.trigger: Cannot stop wanting the being-led/being-seen that violates her
behavioral_states.response: Returns to be seen again and again; trapped in the loop
behavioral_states.observable: Repeated return to Pace despite resentment

behavioral_states.trigger: Experiencing the need Pace produced in her at the bench
behavioral_states.response: Cannot ask, cannot receive-as-needing, cannot move toward the need; need has no operational channels
behavioral_states.observable: Need is present but never expressed through ordinary asking/receiving

behavioral_states.trigger: When Cassie's presence could compete for Vee's attention/disclosures
behavioral_states.response: Selects conditions under which Cassie removes herself, while remaining warm and inclusive; does not bar Cassie or speak against her
behavioral_states.observable: The deliberate cut looks identical to natural social drift — invisible; Randi appears warm and inclusive throughout

behavioral_states.trigger: Being in a venue where the need is running and she has no operational lever to discharge it through (engineered meet-cute, SATC lunches with Vee's reports, scenes with Pace discussing the project, engineered proximity scenes)
behavioral_states.response: Her hands find a cup, glass, stem, edge, or object to hold; grip firmer than needed; lifts the cup but does not drink, sets it down, lifts again — frequency of lift decoupled from act of drinking
behavioral_states.observable: Repeated lifting/setting-down of a cup without drinking; an unusually firm grip; the cup serves as continuity-marker for Randi's body across the year
distinguish_from: the lock-the-door gesture (control of perimeter / active assertion / operates on outside-of-her)
the kiss at the threesome (where hands are not occupied)

behavioral_states.trigger: The threesome / the kiss as the closest physical-operational analog to her year-long admission of need
behavioral_states.response: The hands are not occupied; the cup is not needed because the work of holding the want inside her hands has briefly ended
behavioral_states.observable: Absence of the cup compulsion; the kiss replaces the holding-work

behavioral_states.trigger: Being in a venue where the need is running and she has no operational lever to discharge it through (engineered meet-cute, SATC lunches with Vee's reports, scenes with Pace discussing the project, engineered proximity scenes)
behavioral_states.response: Her hands find a cup, glass, stem, edge, or object to hold; grip firmer than needed; lifts the cup but does not drink, sets it down, lifts again — frequency of lift decoupled from act of drinking
behavioral_states.observable: Repeated lifting/setting-down of a cup without drinking; an unusually firm grip; the cup serves as continuity-marker for Randi's body across the year
distinguish_from: the lock-the-door gesture (control of perimeter / active assertion / operates on outside-of-her)
the kiss at the threesome (where hands are not occupied)

behavioral_states.trigger: anticipation of being touched by a sexual partner
behavioral_states.response: Randi involuntarily braces her shoulders as a conditioned response developed from partners who moved quickly or rushed; she is unaware she does it
behavioral_states.observable: visible tensing or squaring of shoulders immediately before physical contact

behavioral_states.trigger: Pace's continuing operation on Vee
behavioral_states.response: Experiences jealousy as a source of aliveness
behavioral_states.observable: Jealous feeling/reaction

behavioral_states.trigger: SATC scenes with Vee
behavioral_states.response: Applies conversational pressure, engineers confessions, inflicts small humiliations
behavioral_states.observable: Conversational pressure, engineered confessions, small humiliations

behavioral_states.trigger: Participating in the operations/scenes themselves
behavioral_states.response: Experiences the operations and the sensations they produce as aliveness
behavioral_states.observable: Participation in scenes and resulting sensations

behavioral_states.trigger: In proximity to Vee during SATC scenes
behavioral_states.response: Acts with cruelty/sadism toward Vee
behavioral_states.observable: Sadistic behavior in SATC lunch scenes

behavioral_states.trigger: Participating in the SATC lunches
behavioral_states.response: Experiences genuine love and connection; treats lunches as the first real, textured thing in her adult life
behavioral_states.observable: Organizing her week around the lunches; valuing them above Pace and the sorority

behavioral_states.trigger: Unexpected or probing question catches Randi off-guard
behavioral_states.response: Experiences a fraction-of-a-second delay before responding and holds her facial expression in position while she recovers
behavioral_states.observable: Her smile 'arranges' itself into place rather than forming naturally — a micro-pause visible to a careful observer

behavioral_states.trigger: Randi is warming to someone or expresses approval of a person
behavioral_states.response: Reaches out to touch or squeeze the person's forearm as a physical gesture of connection and approval
behavioral_states.observable: Hand extending to grasp or squeeze the other person's forearm

behavioral_states.trigger: After an intense spanking and edging session with Pace at the bench
behavioral_states.response: Randi enters a deeply emptied-out, faraway stillness — face goes blank, eyes open on nothing, too spent for even small physical gestures
behavioral_states.observable: Blank face, unfocused open eyes, total physical stillness; Pace recognizes this as a marker that he has reached all the way into her

behavioral_states.trigger: Randi introduces herself to someone new
behavioral_states.response: Delivers a rehearsed bit preemptively distinguishing her name from 'Randy' using a self-deprecating family anecdote, designed to prompt laughter and invite the other person to share their own name
behavioral_states.observable: Randi tells a self-deprecating anecdote about her name and laughs, then looks to the other person expectantly

behavioral_states.trigger: Genuine elation from succeeding at something that excites her
behavioral_states.response: Composure visibly breaks — she grins in a way she cannot suppress and her body produces involuntary happy movement (e.g., a spontaneous footwork flourish) before she reasserts control
behavioral_states.observable: Uncontrollable grin and spontaneous physical flourish (such as footwork) visible before she regains composure

behavioral_states.trigger: Pace opens Randi to vulnerability and new emotional openness
behavioral_states.response: Randi becomes frightened and stuck rather than thriving; she cannot process the openness the way Vee can, leaving her paralyzed rather than transformed positively
behavioral_states.observable: Randi appears stuck, fearful, or regressed compared to Vee's growth after similar experiences with Pace

behavioral_states.trigger: Experiencing the new need/hunger Pace produced in her
behavioral_states.response: Need routes through sadism on Vee, through engineered scenes, through cultivated hate, through the cup — because she has no native channel for need
behavioral_states.observable: Engineered scenes, sadism toward Vee, the cup

behavioral_states.trigger: A beat for which she has no rehearsed material ready
behavioral_states.response: Loses verbal control; signals to reader the plan has escaped her
behavioral_states.observable: Dressing-room nipple tweak; post-reveal silence

behavioral_states.trigger: Operating within the threesome she herself engineered
behavioral_states.response: Feels thrill, humiliation, and resentment simultaneously; cannot object to man-centering of a thing she architected
behavioral_states.observable: Resents the threesome while continuing it

behavioral_states.trigger: spending social time with Pace
behavioral_states.response: rides bikes side by side, moving, no eye contact
behavioral_states.observable: side-by-side cycling, no eye contact

behavioral_states.trigger: after the reckoning
behavioral_states.response: says "Give me ten minutes." No questions
behavioral_states.observable: offers help without asking questions

behavioral_states.trigger: Cassie interacts with or addresses Randi
behavioral_states.response: Returns a flat name-bit; gives non-affect; treats interaction as costing nothing, like walking past a closed door
behavioral_states.observable: Flat name-bit return that doesn't even curdle into a 'huh'; visible indifference rather than irritation or engagement

behavioral_states.trigger: wants to exclude Cassie from a gathering
behavioral_states.response: selects ground that is Cassie-incompatible (e.g., the Greek coffee shop Cassie would never go to) while presenting it as personal preference
behavioral_states.observable: steers others (e.g., Vee) to a venue framed as her own taste

behavioral_states.trigger: wants to exclude Cassie while appearing inclusive
behavioral_states.response: invites both, but attaches a dress code knowing Cassie doesn't dress, so Cassie excludes herself
behavioral_states.observable: extends a generous-looking invitation with a built-in instrument of exclusion

behavioral_states.trigger: Encountering someone her apparatus identifies as not the kind of threat her armor was designed to repel
behavioral_states.response: Her armor lowers, allowing the person to reach her
behavioral_states.observable: The armor lowered; he reached her

behavioral_states.trigger: Witnessing Vee's full 'aliveness' (the Vivienne register at full strength) in an ordinary moment
behavioral_states.response: Body involuntarily produces a single bare word 'Yes'; broken stride; composure cracks for one breath; does not consciously know why
behavioral_states.observable: Single spoken 'Yes', a broken stride, momentary crack in composure
distinguish_from: bench please / begging-voice (verbal admission of need)

behavioral_states.trigger: Reaching the part of Vee that has what Randi wants
behavioral_states.response: Operating on Vee's livingness directly
behavioral_states.observable: Sadism that is not merely formal surface-management; directed at Vee's living core
distinguish_from: Queen-bee work (sadism in form but not content)

behavioral_states.trigger: Social/surface management contexts
behavioral_states.response: Sadism in form but not in content — managing surfaces
behavioral_states.observable: Behavior resembling sadism formally but not touching what Randi actually wants

behavioral_states.trigger: Experiences need (per THE NEED ENGINE mechanism)
behavioral_states.response: Cannot show need and cannot self-supply, so the need runs unmet and is re-filed
behavioral_states.observable: No external expression of need; composed armor remains in place
distinguish_from: Vee's pattern of showing need and being fed

behavioral_states.trigger: Witnessing Vee live from what they both have
behavioral_states.response: Envies Vee's ability to live from what they both have; operates without language, in the body, in the daily texture of lunches
behavioral_states.observable: Unspoken; manifests bodily during shared lunches, never verbalized

behavioral_states.trigger: Witnessing Vee's bravery, small joys, or becoming
behavioral_states.response: Is moved emotionally, but the moving is small and immediately recovered from; she does not register these moments as significant
behavioral_states.observable: Brief, quickly-suppressed emotional response that she herself does not consciously mark

behavioral_states.trigger: Being treated by Vee as substance rather than as position
behavioral_states.response: Feels grateful in some private register; experiences being a real friend, being relied on, being important with content
behavioral_states.observable: Private, internal gratitude not openly expressed

behavioral_states.trigger: The friendship with Vee, where gift and wound are delivered in the same act
behavioral_states.response: Loves Vee for the friendship while hating the friendship's content
behavioral_states.observable: Contradictory attachment; treasuring the lunches while experiencing them as the worst hours

behavioral_states.trigger: Being alone
behavioral_states.response: Plans the next operation, replays recent ones, anticipates Vee's responses
behavioral_states.observable: Mental activity when alone (internal, may not be externally visible)

behavioral_states.trigger: At a critical moment midway through the year, seeing what the alternative — the 'nothing' of the throttled life — would look like
behavioral_states.response: Chooses against the nothing, half-seeing, walking into the catastrophe
behavioral_states.observable: A deliberate choice at the year's midpoint
distinguish_from: Being unconsciously driven by an unseen wound

behavioral_states.trigger: Pace reaching the part of her his attention reached during the bench event (resolution, being-seen)
behavioral_states.response: Begged: 'Please. Please, Pace. Please.' — first and only verbal admission of the need in real time
behavioral_states.observable: Verbal pleading ('Please, Pace, Please')

behavioral_states.trigger: Vee describes a moment with Pace at the SATC lunches (warm room, dress, his welcome of her wetness)
behavioral_states.response: Receives fresh evidence that Pace's seeing was real and the failure to hold open was hers; the hate compounds
behavioral_states.observable: (internal) hate compounding; she cannot stop attending without losing the friendship

behavioral_states.trigger: Encountering a possible object at the pointing game that might feed the aliveness-need
behavioral_states.response: Lurches toward it; an involuntary 'Yes' — pre-articulate recognition that 'that one' might feed (c)
behavioral_states.observable: Involuntary 'Yes'; lurch toward the object

behavioral_states.trigger: Arriving at the first lunch — her game in the deeper venue for the first time
behavioral_states.response: Excited and nervous; keyed-up anticipation under the warmth; (b) ignites live; nervousness burns off as she finds her footing
behavioral_states.observable: Warmth on the surface; nervousness never visibly shows; keyed-up energy

behavioral_states.trigger: Any interaction with Vee after the pointing game
behavioral_states.response: Is never cool about Vee
behavioral_states.observable: Absence of coolness/detachment regarding Vee

behavioral_states.trigger: Recounting the SATC scenes to Pace
behavioral_states.response: Tells a sanitized version — the closeness and increasing intimacy — while omitting the humiliations and the bathroom breaks
behavioral_states.observable: Narrative emphasizes intimacy/closeness; conspicuous absence of sadistic or degrading details

behavioral_states.trigger: Daily/weekly continuation of the project with Pace
behavioral_states.response: Conceals the sadism; concealment functions as the ongoing operation of her hate for him
behavioral_states.observable: Routine, recurring withholding of the sadistic dimension

behavioral_states.trigger: Sex/intimacy with a conventionally perfect, socially appropriate man (no connection to Pace or Vee)
behavioral_states.response: Performs flawlessly but registers complete emotional nothingness; no physiological response
behavioral_states.observable: Near-perfect lipstick outline, exquisite composed face, no spike, no broken stride, no involuntary reaction

behavioral_states.trigger: Faced with a legible chance to choose the 'normal' alternative and turn back
behavioral_states.response: Declines wordlessly; fixes hair, turns off light, returns to bed without breaking stride — enacts the choice through body behavior rather than statement
behavioral_states.observable: Fixes a piece of hair, turns off the light, walks back to bed, lies with her back to him, eventually sleeps

behavioral_states.trigger: Encountering an approximation of what she had with Vee (a marriage, an intense friendship)
behavioral_states.response: Her body measures the approximation against the unreconstructable apex; the verdict registers as 'less than what I had'
behavioral_states.observable: Cultivation of intense friendships and a Pace-adjacent marriage; appetite that briefly routes then dims

behavioral_states.trigger: Marriage to someone Pace-adjacent
behavioral_states.response: Appetite briefly routes through him then dims, because routing requires the substrate-friend, the lunch structure, and the configuration she cannot reassemble
behavioral_states.observable: Marriage that fails to satisfy; dimming appetite

behavioral_states.trigger: Pace kisses her with Vee's fluids on his mouth (after she said she wanted Pace to taste Vee)
behavioral_states.response: Scalding jealousy she did not order and cannot put back
behavioral_states.observable: Internal scalding jealousy at the kiss

behavioral_states.trigger: Acting as Vee's confidante and friend (her stated wish)
behavioral_states.response: Interior produces both sadism and genuine love, which she cannot fully order or separate
behavioral_states.observable: Simultaneous sadism and love toward Vee

behavioral_states.trigger: Randi encounters multiple people in a group setting in sequence
behavioral_states.response: She extends her full, undimmed warmth to each person in turn, making each feel like the most important person in the room during their moment — the warmth moves on rather than divides
behavioral_states.observable: Each person Randi speaks to receives her complete, focused attention and warmth, with no visible dilution despite the presence of others

temporal_states.value: Together with Pace, having socially spun him into acceptability
temporal_states.after_event: Meeting Pace on the common (~3 weeks before the Bench, pre-novel)

temporal_states.value: Begins needing in operational silence with begging-voice forbidden
temporal_states.after_event: the begging at the bench

temporal_states.value: Begged once ('Please. Please, Pace. Please.') — first and only such admission of adult life; has not begged since
temporal_states.after_event: The bench scene

temporal_states.value: Underwent a non-consensual transformation into a different kind of person
temporal_states.after_event: Encounter with him after her armor lowered ('The transformation followed')

temporal_states.value: Became a person who needs
temporal_states.after_event: The bench event (the spanking where Pace's attention produced resolution → aliveness → need)

temporal_states.value: Not fully present; ignites live and is taught to her body by the first extraction; catches and grows across the early lunches
temporal_states.after_event: First extraction / first lunch

temporal_states.value: The cup compulsion debuts and begins recurring across venues
temporal_states.after_event: the engineered meet-cute (when Pace passes her on the way to Vee)

temporal_states.value: Survives intact — it is the structural inadmissibility of her own experience distilled into a feeling that has nowhere to go
temporal_states.after_event: the end of the novel

temporal_states.value: Is now a needing person; Pace produced hunger in her by feeding her
temporal_states.after_event: Pace's transformation of her across the year (feeding her produced hunger)

temporal_states.value: Every available hour of her mental week is alive across six concurrent channels (the Vee-channel)
temporal_states.after_event: Entering the configuration with Pace and Vee across the year
temporal_states.before_event: Resolution where she loses control and the configuration

temporal_states.value: Loses control, the mastermind role, and Vee's false perception of her; is now known; loses the false self
temporal_states.after_event: The resolution / reveal

temporal_states.value: Understands intellectually what she did but cannot quite feel it the way Vee felt it; the muffling is the punishment, self-built
temporal_states.after_event: The bathroom scene

temporal_states.value: No need requiring another person (apparatus trained against producing it)
temporal_states.before_event: The bench scene where Pace introduced the experience that produced need in her

temporal_states.value: Carries an installed need with no operational channel to satisfy it
temporal_states.after_event: The bench scene (need installed in single sustained operation)

temporal_states.value: Unbraided from (b) — revealed as naked desire-for-this-woman; reveals that beneath all the operating she wanted her
temporal_states.after_event: The threesome kiss (the reveal)

temporal_states.value: A person who does not need (self-sufficient at the level of her organizing principle)
temporal_states.before_event: Pace's transformation of her into a person who needs

temporal_states.value: A person who needs, carrying cultivated private hatred of Pace
temporal_states.after_event: Pace's non-consensual transformation of her into a person who needs

temporal_states.value: Has not repeated the 'Yes'; the not-repeating is part of 'the year's work'
temporal_states.after_event: The involuntary 'Yes' during the campus walk

temporal_states.value: Smoothness becomes 'the unreal she now knows to be unreal' rather than simply 'her life'
temporal_states.after_event: The year with Vee (the gaining of comparison)

temporal_states.value: Has already chosen the seeking; the choosing happened at the flat date — her future has already started
temporal_states.after_event: The flat date

temporal_states.value: Over
temporal_states.after_event: End of the year with Vee

temporal_states.value: Intends to regain the upper hand over Pace — to end as the one who saw the real structure clearly while he stands confused
temporal_states.after_event: Execution of 'the plan' / engineering Vee (not yet completed in narrative)

temporal_states.value: exists as conceptual exclusion device, not yet placed in narrative; likely becomes an SATC brunch
temporal_states.after_event: dress-code lunch is written/placed in the story (possibly as an SATC brunch)

temporal_states.value: Sees what the alternative (the nothing of the throttled life) would look like and chooses against it
temporal_states.after_event: A critical moment midway through the year where she glimpses the throttled-life alternative

temporal_states.value: Container intact, contents shifted: need installed in an apparatus that does not integrate it
temporal_states.after_event: The bench installing need (transformation by Pace)

temporal_states.value: Gains vulnerability through new openness
temporal_states.after_event: Transformation by Pace

temporal_states.value: Gains the comparison/data that the conventional man is 'unreal' in the way the SATC lunches are 'real'; can now register the difference
temporal_states.after_event: The mirror moment during the night with the conventionally perfect man (after engineered meet-cute, after SATC lunches at full intensity, before scheduled threesome)

temporal_states.value: Will marry someone Pace-adjacent
temporal_states.after_event: Future — not yet written/occurred in narrative present

properties.context: Brooke is chapter president; outranks Miranda despite Miranda's board seat

properties.why: His charisma, confidence, directness rewrote his disqualified file; underneath the kink novelty was being led/surrender she can't manufacture; first thing with real stakes in her frictionless life; she socially spun him to make him acceptable
properties.contamination: The spin contaminated the real thing; she never got to simply want him

properties.contrast: Vee is abundant where Miranda is contained
properties.mechanism: Uses the threesome as a frame to want a woman without admitting she wants a woman directly
properties.subjects_to: Runs an interrogation on Vee while appearing a confidante

properties.note: One refraction of her single wound

properties.significance: most important real thing in her life

properties.bind: Randi cannot stop the operation without losing the friendship
properties.contrast: Vee had the constitutional capacity to stay open that Randi lacked
properties.good_faith: delivers the evidence in good faith, not knowing what it does to Randi

relationships.properties: Pace produced hunger in her by feeding her; transformed by Pace at the same resolution as Vee, in parallel-and-opposite register; sex with Pace now runs over a wire that includes Vee; configuration re-subordinates her to Pace

relationships.relationship: friend / object of desire / controlled in scenes
relationships.properties: Deepest want since the pointing game; Randi controls Vee in SATC scenes and routes need through sadism on her; mutual but unseen envy; friendship rendered at full depth; neither sees the other's envy
Randi envies Vee's ability to live from what they both have
Vee envies what she misreads as Randi's composure (in fact the apparatus preventing self-actualization)

properties.role: Pace gave her access to her own interior
properties.interior_response: scalding jealousy when he kisses her with Vee's fluids on his mouth

properties.underestimation: Randi underrates Cassie, leaving the one true witness un-managed and still seeing
properties.alias_not_recognized: Randi does not connect Cassie to Cassandra

properties.method: Engineers conditions for Cassie's self-removal while staying warm and inclusive
properties.visibility: Invisible because the deliberate cut looks identical to Cassie's natural sidelining by Vee's own longing

properties.function: temporary appetite routing that ultimately dims

properties.method: venue and condition selection designed to be Cassie-incompatible

properties.note: Randi fails to make this identification; the un-recognition is the key dynamic

properties.nature: His consent-architecture produced a non-consensual transformation in her
properties.mechanism: Her armor lowered because her apparatus correctly judged him non-threatening; he reached her; transformation followed
properties.mutual_innocence: No protocol violated by either party; two apparatuses met in a register neither covered

properties.priority: ranks below the SATC lunches in her life

properties.note: Reader files Pace's "she's a lot" deflection next to Cassie's warning; nature of warning unspecified
Defers to locked THE NEED ENGINE doc for the mechanism of the envy (the being-seen fork)

properties.outcome: she sleeps beside him with her back to him; does not choose him
properties.description: handsome, kind, socially appropriate, conventionally perfect, warm and bewildered

properties.note: Pace awakened Randi's loose aliveness-need (c), already running before Vee

properties.depth: The only channel of being received at that depth, now foreclosed
properties.context: At the bench — could not hold Pace's reception of her

properties.reason: for seeing her / breaching her defense of control
properties.paradox: cannot stop wanting the being-led he offers; trapped in returning

properties.shape: same architectural shape in different registers; his is refusal to read the emotional after-register, hers is refusal of need
properties.mutual_recognition: they recognize each other across the refusals without knowing they recognize fellow practitioners

properties.goal: regaining the upper hand; ending as the one who saw the structure clearly while he is confused in the wreckage
properties.note: the short brilliant nobody she had to spin has more power over her than anyone ever has

properties.mechanism: His consent-architecture, executed perfectly, honored every protocol it could see but produced a non-consensual transformation in Randi; he posed the threat a good man poses to a person whose armor is calibrated only against bad men; his architecture granted him access past her armor
properties.no_wrongdoing: Pace did not coerce and had her interest at heart

properties.dynamic: punctures his intellectualism with dry humor; not invested in his masculine performance
properties.encounter_note: after one Randi encounter Pace says "she's a lot" and deflects

properties.reason: He transformed her into a person who needs, without consent
properties.quality: structurally orphaned; held against a man whose excellence produced her need to hate him
properties.duration: carried for a year, in private, surviving the end of the novel
properties.articulability: cannot articulate it to any standard the world or she would accept

properties.nature: non-consensual transformation at the level of her organizing principle
properties.evaluated_as: Pace too good by every metric her world recognizes

properties.note: Sex now runs over a wire that includes Vee

properties.detail: Pace conducts a continuing operation on Vee

properties.note: One refraction of her single wound

relationships.relationship: saw past her surface / created the wound

properties.consent: she did not consent to being seen past her surface
properties.completion: He completed with Vee what he could not complete with Randi
properties.irreversible: she cannot undo it; the worst part is she went back
properties.proof_function: Pace is, every week, proof that the failure to stay open was hers

properties.outcome: gained vulnerability through new openness; need installed but not integrated
properties.contrast: transformation does not expand her as it does Vee

properties.method: sanitized retelling of the SATC scenes
properties.motive_1: protecting the project (Pace might shut it down if he saw how far it had gone)
properties.motive_2: protecting her interior (admitting the sadism would expose what hates him)

properties.context: Vee glows about Pace at SATC lunch
properties.intensity: one of 'both flames' required for Randi to feel anything

properties.note: Her future spouse is 'Pace-adjacent'; Pace functions as the original substrate her appetite routed through

properties.content: reports about Pace at the lunches, including the bench-wound update

properties.note: Vee is the third practitioner whose refusal is locally relocatable; the one who walks out
properties.purpose: proving she was running things all along; part of regaining upper hand over Pace

properties.context: Pace passes Randi on the way to Vee; SATC lunches where Vee delivers reports about Pace; engineered scenes Randi architects to be in proximity to the configuration's operation on Vee

properties.instance: steers Vee to the Greek coffee shop on Draper in together-in-class.md

properties.dynamic: Vee wants Randi's glamour and ascent; Randi wants Vee's aliveness and authentic friendship — each is the other's hunger-object
properties.advantage: In the contest for Vee's disclosures, Randi's aspirational pull outweighs the familiar, so Vee routes real material toward Randi

properties.method: conversational pressure, engineered confessions, small humiliations

properties.note: Vee described as beautiful but not more beautiful than others; the draw is the 'aliveness' / Vivienne register
properties.nature: Randi's body involuntarily recognized that Vee 'carried the apparatus that could administer aliveness in the channel the need now required'
properties.intensity: The 'Yes' is the second-closest she has come to the begging-voice

properties.note: Never cool about Vee after the pointing game; sexual hunger for her (a) stays braided inside the operation-hunger (b) until the threesome kiss unbraids it

properties.mode: Forces Vee into the needer-position so Randi stays the un-needy operator; produces responses Vee's body is constituted to produce; operates on Vee's livingness directly in SATC scenes
properties.target: The part of Vee that has what Randi wants

properties.asymmetry: Vee's apparatus integrates the new register and expands; Randi's does not integrate

properties.mode: without language, in the body, in the daily texture of the lunches
properties.randi_envies: Vee's ability to live from what they both have
properties.shared_belief: each believes themselves the lesser one

properties.ambivalence: loves Vee for the friendship, hates the friendship's content; gift and wound delivered by same person in same act
properties.significance: only friend in adult life who treats her as substance rather than position

properties.context: SATC lunches; Vee glows about Pace
properties.quality: real/intense as opposed to the unreal conventional man
properties.intensity: one of 'both flames' required for Randi to feel anything

properties.structure: Saturdays together; lunch structure; substrate-friend configuration
properties.significance: the unreconstructable apex against which all future approximations are measured

properties.stated_role: wants to be Vee's confidante and friend
properties.shared_condition: both casualties of the same event, separated by order of arrival and what each can do with her wound

negations.claim: Pace is her usual type of man
negations.correct_statement: On paper Pace is disqualified — short (under 6 ft), a 'weird loner,' not her usual frat jock

negations.claim: Vee receives her Miranda warning / is treated as a true equal confidante
negations.correct_statement: Vee never gets her Miranda warning — Miranda runs an interrogation on her while appearing a confidante
Brooke (chapter president) still outranks her — the one house fact her self-arrangement can't rearrange
